mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Strong monthly job gains above 130k signal robust labor market conditions that boost consumer spending and corporate earnings, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 130k, or the signal's IC drops below 0.05 in rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production above 100 signals improved manufacturing activity that boosts corporate profits, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative in 50%+ of periods when INDPRO exceeds 100, or the signal's IC falls below 0.04 in 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Strong GDP growth above $13.16 trillion indicates robust economic demand that supports equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative in 50%+ of periods when GDPC1 exceeds 13160, or the signal's IC drops below 0.03 in 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in consumer spending (RSAFS) and declining unemployment (UNRATE) signal strong demand-side momentum that drives equity market gains over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The interaction signal fails when SPX returns are negative in 50%+ of instances where both RSAFS > 355k and UNRATE < 10, or the interaction term's coefficient is not statistically significant (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Monetary tightening cycles initiated by FEDFUNDS above 4.5% increase discount rates and reduce equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are positive in 60%+ of periods when FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.5, or the signal's IC drops below -0.03 in 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 2% (CPIAUCSL) prompts central bank rate hikes that compress earnings multiples, generating negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are positive in 50%+ of periods when CPIAUCSL exceeds 2, or the signal's IC is less than -0.04 in 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in housing starts (HOUST) and industrial production (INDPRO) indicates strong demand-side momentum that drives equity market gains over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The interaction signal fails when SPX returns are negative in 50%+ of instances where both HOUST > 590 and INDPRO > 100, or the interaction term's coefficient is not statistically significant (p > 0.05).
